Author: snazz
Name: Snazzy P4
Punchline: A robust custom macro system for the Kefka UMAD/DMU Phase 4 mechanics.
Description: A robust custom macro system for the Kefka UMAD/DMU Phase 4 mechanics. Press the buttons for what you see in the fight and it lays out clean, colour-coded callouts. Open with /snazzyp4.
Changelog: Lightning/Drop party callouts return in Classic Mode with correct short/long timing (your body press pins which Exdeath owns which set), plus a new All Bombs callout when both Exdeath presses match. The per-set Acceleration announcement is removed. See CHANGELOG.md.
